meta.notes: T1 original exec (grand-zephyr) was SIGTERM'd during clip 3 CDN upload at ~510s. T1b re-run (tidy-fjord, 123.4s) completed clip 3 with all prior stages cached. T1 effective duration estimated ~442s (consistent with T3/T4 reference runs on same video). AV1 hw decode unavailable — H264 mmco warnings observed in stderr but face timeline completed in ~20s (not ~60s as AV1 would require). T4 requested 5 clips but LLM returned 3 (3m27s video only has 3 viable segments). Wall total includes T1 kill+rerun overhead (~130s extra vs clean run). system_prompt_tokens = first-turn cacheRead.

test_input.name: matt-cutts-30days
test_input.description: Matt Cutts — Try Something New for 30 Days (TED Talk, 3m27s)

task.name: long-to-short-video
task.purpose: Download YouTube video, select best clips via LLM, reframe 9:16, burn captions, upload to CDN
task.expected_output: 3-5 short MP4 clips (9:16) with virality scores and CDN URLs

install.notes: LTSV v1.0.5 already installed. CMS fetch only (0.171s).

asset_acquisition.notes: N/A — download is internal to S1 skill stage (Apify), not a separate phase

execution.notes: T4 clips_requested=5 but clips_returned=3 (3m27s video has only 3 viable 45s segments). S4-S7 per clip averages ~119s across all runs (dominated by OpenCV face detection + reframe + caption burn). Apify download consistently ~36-52s. H264 face timeline ~20s (fast vs AV1). execution.total_s = sum of 4 test steps (T1 estimated). tool_calls_s includes T1b_rerun (123.4s extra exec for clip 3 completion).

delivery.notes: 9 clips uploaded across T1/T3/T4 (T2 cache hit, no upload). Total ~35MB. upload_s estimated ~15s cumulative. output_url = T1 clip 1 CDN URL.
